name: river-phonk
description: The remix proof: River's hook re-gridded from rubato to a rigid 140 bpm and rebuilt as phonk - pitched cowbell lead, tanh-driven 808 sub, bitcrushed lo-fi piano, hat rolls, drop/break/drop arrangement, slammed to -12 LUFS. Replay with: sonarium replay docs/examples/river-phonk.json. The 808 and the melodic stack duck under a kick-keyed sidechain (the phonk pump); the reverb lives on the melodics only, so the sub stays dry.

steps.note: Five layers in one mix: the kit's syncopated kicks (steps 0/6/10) with snares on 2&4 and 16th hat rolls; the 808 (bass voice -> tanh drive -> 220 Hz lowpass) following F#m-D-A-E roots; the cowbell carrying the hook; the piano playing the same hook through bitcrush 8 + a dark lowpass for the Memphis tape vibe; strings filling the break. The arrangement is intro / drop / break / drop / outro by bar ranges in the note steps.
